##RRUFFID=R150122
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CuPb_2_(MoO_4_)(AsO_4_)(OH)
##LOCALITY=Dulcinea de Llampos Mine, Copiapó Province, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Tabular olive-green crystals, associated with wulfenite and malachite. Note that the c-cell edge is half of what is usually reported.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150122
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.0868 b: 5.9658 c: 8.8233 alpha: 90 beta: 109.7214 gamma: 90 volume: 400.701 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
